toolPurpose: Search items across eBay marketplace with optional filtering by category, price range, and sorting preferences.

q.description: Search query keyword(s) to find items on eBay

category_ids.description: List of category IDs to narrow search scope

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-200, default 50)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (default 0)

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed information for a specific item by item ID, including price, condition, seller info, and shipping details.

item_id.description: eBay item ID to retrieve details for

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response (optional, returns all by default)

toolPurpose: Retrieve all item variations within an item group, useful for exploring different colors, sizes, or product variants.

item_group_id.description: eBay item group ID to retrieve all variations for

limit.description: Maximum number of item variations to return (1-200, default 50)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (default 0)

toolPurpose: Perform visual search on eBay marketplace using base64-encoded image to find similar or identical items.

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image data for visual search

image_url.description: Alternative: URL to image (if image_data not provided)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-200, default 50)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (default 0)

toolPurpose: Retrieve trending deals and popular items from eBay marketplace by category, useful for market trend analysis.

category_ids.description: List of category IDs to filter trending items (optional, returns all categories if omitted)

limit.description: Maximum number of trending items to return (1-200, default 30)

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination (default 0)
